ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "subregion" INTEGER /* ID of the subregion the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a leap year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population */,
  "yearly_percent_change" REAL /* Yearly percentage change in population */,
  "yearly_change" TEXT /* Yearly change in population */,
  "net_migrants" TEXT /* Net number of migrants (in and out) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Fertility rate (births per woman) */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "urban_population_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "urban_population" TEXT /* Urban population */,
  "country_share_of_world_population" REAL /* Country's share of the world population */,
  "world_population" TEXT /* World population */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Global rank of the country by population */,
  "male_population" TEXT /* Total male population */,
  "female_population" TEXT /* Total female population */,
  "dependency_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of dependents to the working-age population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Number of births per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Number of deaths per 1,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the region (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the subregion belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the subregion */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the subregion in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the subregion (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the indicator value */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, public user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., organization, institution) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_method" TEXT /* Method used to import the data (e.g., API, manual upload) */,
  "importer" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that imported the data */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "importer" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is private */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
